examples: She was always in belligerency when others belittled her.
Whether it works or not, it shows how much the nature of modern belligerency is changing.
History has shown time and again that peace, prosperity and stable civil society cannot flourish when threats and belligerency abound.
As mentioned previously, wars are often waged among non-state actors and it must be understood however, that recognition of belligerency does not necessarily mean recognition of statehood.
